headline: United Airlines Hits Passengers With This New Fee Hike. Pain for Travellers Is Just Beginning.
summary: United Airlines and JetBlue have raised baggage fees. Expect higher travel costs to reverberate through the industry.

raw.headline: United Airlines Hits Passengers With This New Fee Hike. Pain for Travellers Is Just Beginning.
raw.summary: United Airlines and JetBlue have raised baggage fees. Expect higher travel costs to reverberate through the industry.

headline: United to Introduce Tiered Fare Categories, Giving Customers More Options Across Every Type of Ticket
summary: United today announced a new tiered fare structure that will make it easier for customers to find the flight experience that best matches their preferences.

headline: United unveils basic Polaris business fare in premium cabin overhaul
summary: United is overhauling its fare classes, offering cheaper business class and premium economy fares that are more restrictive.

raw.headline: United unveils basic Polaris business fare in premium cabin overhaul
raw.summary: United is overhauling its fare classes, offering cheaper business class and premium economy fares that are more restrictive.

headline: Looming “Oil Cliff” Pinches Airline Profits, Traveler Wallets
summary: Average jet fuel prices have outpaced the rise in oil prices, soaring about 100% in the month since the start of the Iran war.

raw.headline: Looming “Oil Cliff” Pinches Airline Profits, Traveler Wallets
